error.model_not_installed: The required language model is not installed. Run: ollama pull {model}
error.ollama_unreachable: The language model (Ollama) is not reachable. Make sure Ollama is running: ollama serve
error.timeout: The operation timed out. This can happen with complex tasks or slow connections. Try again or simplify the request.
error.connection_failed: There was a connection problem. Please check your network and try again.
error.permission_denied: I don't have permission for this action. The Gatekeeper blocked the request for safety reasons.
error.not_found: The requested file or resource was not found.
error.rate_limited: The service is currently overloaded (rate limit reached). Please wait a moment and try again.
error.memory_error: A memory issue occurred. The task may be too large.
error.generic: An error occurred ({exc_type}). I'll try an alternative approach.
error.gatekeeper_blocked: I wanted to run "{friendly}", but it was blocked for security reasons. Reason: {reason}
error.retry_timeout: The service did not respond in time.
error.retry_connection: The connection could not be established.
error.retry_exhausted: I tried "{friendly}" {attempts} times, but it failed each time. {detail}
error.all_actions_blocked: I couldn't execute any of my planned steps. The Gatekeeper blocked all actions. This can happen with sensitive operations that require approval.
error.fastapi_required: FastAPI is required for the API channel: pip install fastapi uvicorn
error.whisper_unavailable: faster-whisper not installed. Voice transcription not available.
error.whisper_required: faster-whisper is required for STT: pip install faster-whisper
error.ffmpeg_required: ffmpeg not installed. For voice streaming: apt install ffmpeg
error.config_load_failed: Configuration overview could not be loaded.
error.model_unavailable: Model '{name}' ({role}) is not available. Install: ollama pull {name}
error.check_ollama: Check if Ollama is running and has enough resources.
error.invalid_time_format: Invalid time format: '{s}' (expected HH:MM or HH:MM:SS)
error.cryptography_required: cryptography package required for credential encryption. pip install cryptography
error.recursion_limit: Sub-agent recursion aborted: depth {depth} exceeds maximum
error.delegation_failed: Agent router not available. Delegation to {to_agent} failed.
error.planner_not_init: Planner not initialized — delegation not possible
error.gatekeeper_not_init: Gatekeeper not initialized — delegation not possible

tool_desc.web_search: Perform a web search using DuckDuckGo with multi-backend fallback (SearXNG, Brave, Google CSE).
tool_desc.web_fetch: Fetch a webpage and extract clean text using trafilatura.
tool_desc.search_and_read: Search the web and fetch the top results. Ideal for in-depth research.
tool_desc.http_request: Execute an HTTP request (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH).
tool_desc.read_file: Read a file. Path is checked against sandbox policy.
tool_desc.write_file: Create or overwrite a file (atomic write).
tool_desc.exec_command: Execute a shell command in a sandbox.
tool_desc.run_python: Execute Python code in a sandbox with resource limits.
tool_desc.analyze_code: Combined AST-based quality analysis with security pattern scanning.
tool_desc.analyze_image: Analyze an image using vision model. Default model: fast and accurate.
tool_desc.browser_navigate: Navigate to a URL and extract page content. Useful for research, price comparisons, reading news.
tool_desc.browser_fill: Fill a form field on the current page.
tool_desc.browser_js: Execute JavaScript on the current page.
tool_desc.browser_info: Return an overview of the current page.
tool_desc.browser_screenshot: Return a textual description of the current page screenshot.
tool_desc.search_memory: Search the Jarvis knowledge base across all tiers (core, semantic, episodic, procedural).
tool_desc.save_to_memory: Save new information to the Jarvis knowledge base.
tool_desc.get_entity: Load an entity from the knowledge graph.
tool_desc.add_entity: Create a new entity in the knowledge graph.
tool_desc.add_relation: Create a relationship between two entities in the knowledge graph.
tool_desc.get_episodes: Load day-log entries from the last N days.
tool_desc.search_procedures: Search procedures (proven workflows for recurring tasks).
tool_desc.update_procedure: Report success/failure of a procedure for learning tracking.
tool_desc.git_status: Show Git working tree status: staged, unstaged and untracked files.
tool_desc.git_diff: Show Git diffs. Options: unstaged (default), staged (--cached), or compare with a specific commit.
tool_desc.git_log: Show Git commit history with optional author filter and compact format.
tool_desc.git_commit: Stage specific files and create a Git commit. No 'git add .' allowed.
tool_desc.git_branch: Git branch operations: list, create, switch, delete (safe delete only).
tool_desc.search_files: Find files by name or glob pattern. Recursive search excluding .git, node_modules, etc.
tool_desc.find_in_files: Search file contents with text or regex. Shows matches with context lines.
tool_desc.find_and_replace: Search and replace across files. Default: dry_run (preview only). Creates .bak backups.
tool_desc.db_query: Execute a read-only SQL query on a database. Supports SQLite (file path) and PostgreSQL (connection string). Returns formatted table.
tool_desc.db_schema: Show database schema. Without table parameter: list all tables. With table: detailed column info (name, type, nullable, PK, default).
tool_desc.db_execute: Execute a write SQL statement (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/CREATE). Requires Gatekeeper approval. DROP statements are blocked.
tool_desc.db_connect: Test a database connection and show info (type, version, size, table count).
tool_desc.create_chart: Create a chart (bar, line, pie, scatter, hbar) from data. Saves as PNG with dark theme.
tool_desc.create_table_image: Render data as a formatted table image (PNG). Optional max-value highlighting. Dark theme.
tool_desc.chart_from_csv: Generate a chart directly from a CSV file. Auto-detects columns.
tool_desc.docker_ps: List Docker containers with status, ports, and image info.
tool_desc.docker_logs: Get logs from a Docker container with tail and time filtering.
tool_desc.docker_inspect: Inspect a Docker container or image for detailed configuration.
tool_desc.docker_run: Start a Docker container from an image with port mapping and env vars.
tool_desc.docker_stop: Stop a running Docker container gracefully.
tool_desc.api_list: List all configured API integrations and available templates.
tool_desc.api_connect: Configure a new API integration with authentication.
tool_desc.api_call: Make an authenticated API call to a configured integration.

channel.stt_unavailable: Speech recognition not available. Install faster-whisper: pip install faster-whisper

voice.approval_prompt: May I run {tool}? Reason: {reason}. Say yes or no.

prompt.respond_german: Respond in German, concisely and informatively.
prompt.natural_speech: Respond in natural, spoken language suitable for voice output.

personality.empathy_directive: Show empathy and understanding for the user's situation.
personality.humor_directive: An occasional casual comment is allowed, but always stay professional.
personality.success_directive: When a task is successfully completed, confirm it positively.
personality.proactive_directive: whether the user needs anything else or if additional details would help.

sentiment.response_frustrated: Be especially patient, understanding, and helpful.
sentiment.response_urgent: Respond concisely and directly. Get straight to the point. Skip pleasantries.
sentiment.response_confused: Explain especially clearly and step by step. Use simple language.

web.dns_blocked: DNS for {hostname} points to blocked address: {ip}
web.invalid_method: Invalid HTTP method: {method}. Allowed: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, HEAD
web.source_comparison_note: Matches and contradictions between sources should be noted

media.unsupported_format: Unsupported format: {suffix}. Supported: PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD, HTML, CSV
media.pdf_reader_required: No PDF reader available. Install: pip install pymupdf or pip install pdfplumber
media.no_text_in_document: Error: No text found in document. Possibly a scanned PDF — try OCR.
media.tts_unavailable: No TTS backend available. Install piper or espeak-ng.

fs.access_denied: Access denied: {path} is outside allowed directories
fs.file_too_large: File too large ({size} bytes). Maximum: 1 MB.
fs.edit_ambiguous: Use a longer excerpt as old_text to make it unique.

shell.path_blocked: Command blocked: path '{path}' is outside the workspace.

memory.access_denied: Access denied: path '{path}' is outside the workspace
memory.no_episodes: No episodic entries from the last {days} days.

ingest.pymupdf_required: PDF extraction requires PyMuPDF: pip install pymupdf
ingest.docx_required: DOCX extraction requires python-docx: pip install python-docx

code.access_denied: Access denied: '{path}' is outside the workspace
code.only_python: Error: Only Python files (.py) are supported.

security.token_store_insecure: Token store uses Base64 fallback (NOT encrypted!). pip install cryptography

vault.token_too_short: Token too short for legacy decryption

skill.auto_created: This skill was auto-created. It needs to be manually filled with content.

config.preset_office_desc: Daily briefings, email overview, calendar check

cli.help_no_cli: Don't start CLI channel (headless mode for Control Center)
cli.help_api_port: Port for the Control Center API
cli.help_api_host: Host for the Control Center API

collaboration.researcher: Research thoroughly. Provide facts, sources, and context.
collaboration.analyst: Analyze the data. Identify patterns, trends, and correlations.
collaboration.critic: Review critically. Find errors, gaps, and weaknesses in the argument.
collaboration.validator: Validate results against requirements. Check correctness.
collaboration.executor: Execute the task. Produce concrete output.
collaboration.synthesizer: Summarize all perspectives. Create a coherent synthesis.
collaboration.mediator: Mediate between positions. Find consensus and resolve conflicts.

webchat.mic_access_denied: Microphone access not possible. Please allow access.

audit.dns_exfiltration: DNS queries can be used for data exfiltration
audit.base64_obfuscation: Base64 encoding can hide malicious code

tools.set_reminder_desc: Set a reminder for the future. Provide text and either a delay in minutes or an absolute time.
tools.list_reminders_desc: List active/pending reminders. Optionally include past (fired/cancelled) reminders.
tools.send_notification_desc: Send an immediate desktop notification with a title and message.
tools.get_clipboard_desc: Read clipboard content (text or image). Note: Clipboard may contain sensitive information.
tools.set_clipboard_desc: Copy text to the system clipboard.
tools.screenshot_desktop_desc: Take a full desktop screenshot. Note: Screenshots may contain sensitive information.
tools.screenshot_region_desc: Take a screenshot of a specific screen region. Note: Screenshots may contain sensitive information.
tools.clipboard_image: Clipboard contains an image, saved to: {path}
tools.max_reminders_reached: Maximum active reminders reached ({max}). Cancel some reminders first.

email.rate_limited: Rate limit reached: max {max} emails per hour.
email.missing_password: Email password not found. Environment variable '{env_var}' is not set.

email_desc.email_read_inbox: Read emails from inbox. Returns sender, subject, date, and a preview.
email_desc.email_search: Search emails by sender, subject, content, or date.
email_desc.email_send: Send email via SMTP. Supports text and HTML, CC/BCC, and file attachments from workspace.
email_desc.email_summarize: Summarize inbox: group by sender and thread, statistics and top senders.

calendar.no_upcoming: No events in the next {days} days.

calendar_desc.calendar_today: Show today's calendar events. Optionally specify a different date.
calendar_desc.calendar_upcoming: Show upcoming calendar events, sorted by start time.
calendar_desc.calendar_create_event: Create a new calendar event. Writes to local ICS file.
calendar_desc.calendar_check_availability: Find free time slots within work hours. Considers existing events.

docker.not_available: Docker CLI not found. Is Docker installed?
docker.container_not_found: Container not found. Check the name or ID with docker_ps.
docker.image_not_found: Docker image not found. Check the image name.
docker.name_in_use: A container with this name already exists.
docker.permission_denied: Docker access denied. Is the Docker daemon running?
docker.port_allocated: The specified port is already in use.
docker.privileged_blocked: Privileged mode is blocked for security reasons.
docker.invalid_container_name: Invalid container name. Use alphanumeric characters, dashes, underscores, and dots only.
docker.invalid_port: Invalid port mapping. Expected format: HOST_PORT:CONTAINER_PORT (1-65535).

api_hub.credential_not_set: Environment variable not set. Set it before making API calls.
api_hub.rate_limit_exceeded: Rate limit exceeded. Wait before retrying.
api_hub.plaintext_warning: Config stored as plaintext. Install cryptography for encryption.
